z3.reason: Encode L4 SCC isolation as UNSAT query over coupling graph

cvc5.reason: not needed -- z3 covers UNSAT proofs

sympy.reason: Symbolic derivation of I_c change under Z-dephasing

geomstats.reason: not needed -- Hopf geometry via Cl(3)

rustworkx.reason: Full 25-cell SCC analysis and partial order

toponetx.reason: not needed -- layer topology via rustworkx

L1_on_L4.note: SU(2) rotation U_A is unitary. S(C) unchanged (U_A does not act on C). S(AC) invariant: U_A ⊗ I_C is unitary on subsystem AC -> spectrum preserved. Therefore I_c = S(C) - S(AC) unchanged -> PRESERVE expected.

L2_on_L4.note: CPT = sigma_y on A (unitary: sigma_y^dag sigma_y = I). Local unitary on A leaves S(AC) invariant -> PRESERVE expected. True CPT is anti-unitary; here we apply the matrix part only.

L3_on_L4.note: Z-dephasing is non-unitary CPTP: zeroes off-diagonal elements of qubit A in Z-basis. S(C) unchanged (channel only on A). S(AC) increases (more noise on AC). I_c = S(C) - S(AC) decreases -> DEGRADE or DESTROY expected.

L4_on_L5.note: Fe relay as CPTP channel: (1-relay)*rho + relay*SWAP_BC*rho*SWAP_BC^dag. Relay transfers weight from AB entanglement to BC, disturbing Werner structure. rho_AB after = partial trace over C -> discord expected to DEGRADE or DESTROY.

L5_on_L2.note: Pure |+i> L-chiral: pL=1, pR=0, H=0. Depolarizing D_p=0.5: (1-p)*rho + p*I/2. I/2 = 0.5*P_L + 0.5*P_R (equal L/R). After: pL -> (1-p)*1 + p*0.5 = 0.75, pR -> p*0.5 = 0.25. H(0.75,0.25) > 0 -> H increases from 0 -> ENHANCE (0->positive).

L5_on_L3.note: rho = diag(0.7, 0.3): off-diagonal = 0. D_p=0.5: (1-0.5)*diag(0.7,0.3) + 0.5*I/2 = diag(0.6, 0.4). Still diagonal. Off-diagonal before=0, after=0 -> NULL. Depolarizing does NOT create off-diagonal from a diagonal state.

neg_L1_on_L4_maximally_mixed.note: Maximally mixed state: I_c=0 must stay 0 under any unitary

neg_L3_on_L4_full_dephasing.note: p=1 dephasing: Z-basis measurement, must damage more than p=0.5

neg_L5_on_L2_fully_depolarized.note: I/2 must give H = log(2) ≈ 0.693 nats (max chirality entropy)

boundary_L1_on_L4_identity.note: Identity rotation: I_c must be numerically identical

boundary_L4_on_L5_relay0.note: relay=0 is identity: discord must be unchanged

sympy_L3_on_L4.S_C_invariance_proof: Phi is trace-preserving on A: Tr_A[Phi_p(rho)] = Tr_A[rho]. Therefore rho_C = Tr_{AB}[Phi_p(rho_ABC)] = Tr_{AB}[rho_ABC] = rho_C_orig.
sympy_L3_on_L4.S_AC_increase_formula: At p=0.5: rho_AC -> diag-block(rho_00_C, rho_11_C). S(rho_AC_dep) = H(p0,1-p0) + p0*S(sigma_0) + (1-p0)*S(sigma_1). By concavity of entropy: S(rho_AC_dep) >= S(rho_AC). Equality iff rho_AC already block-diagonal.
sympy_L3_on_L4.data_processing_inequality: Formal DPI: I_c(A->C) non-increasing under CPTP channels on A. Z-dephasing is CPTP. S(C) unchanged. S(AC) increases. => I_c after <= I_c before.
sympy_L3_on_L4.Delta_Ic_at_p1: maximum decrease (rho_AC fully block-diagonal in A)
sympy_L3_on_L4.closed_form_bound: I_c_after(p) = S(C) - S(rho_AC_dep(p)). S(rho_AC_dep(p)) = S((1-2p)^2 * rho_AC_offdiag + rho_AC_diag_blocks). Monotone decreasing in |1-2p| -> maximally degraded at p=0.5.
sympy_L3_on_L4.note: Sympy used for symbolic entropy formula and simplification.

z3_L4_isolation_proof.interpretation: NOT_PROVED: L4 has mutual PRESERVE cycles with L1 and L2 (prior: L4_on_L1=PRESERVE, L1_on_L4=PRESERVE, L4_on_L2=PRESERVE, L2_on_L4=PRESERVE). New results: L3_on_L4=DEGRADE, L4_on_L5=DESTROY, L1_on_L4=PRESERVE, L2_on_L4=PRESERVE. L4 is NOT a total singleton -- it bridges to base cluster via L1/L2 PRESERVE pairs. L4 IS isolated from L3 (degrade) and L5 (destroy/degrade). Revised picture: L4 connects weakly to {L1,L2} but not to {L3,L5}.
z3_L4_isolation_proof.note: UNSAT -> no positive cycle through L4 -> isolation PROVED. SAT -> positive cycle found -> NOT isolated (L4 in SCC with L1/L2).

rustworkx_complete_matrix.note: All 25 cells included. SCCs computed on directed coupling graph. Edges weighted: ENHANCE=2, PRESERVE=1, NULL=0, DEGRADE=-1, DESTROY=-2. An SCC of size >1 means mutual PRESERVE/ENHANCE cycle between layers.
